title: Chengdu Travel Guide for Foreign Visitors
metaDescription: Discover essential tips for exploring Chengdu, from pandas to spicy cuisine and local neighborhoods.

sections.heading: h1
sections.content: Welcome to Chengdu, a city of relaxed charm, giant pandas, and fiery cuisine. Use local apps like Didi for rides and have translation apps ready to navigate the vibrant streets and friendly atmosphere.

sections.heading: h2
sections.content: Visit the Chengdu Research Base of Giant Panda Breeding early to see the pandas active. Explore the historic Jinli Ancient Street and the serene Wuhou Shrine for a taste of local culture and history.

sections.heading: h3
sections.content: Venture into lively areas like Kuanzhai Alley for tea houses and snacks. Don't miss sampling authentic Sichuan hotpot; start with a mild broth and enjoy the communal dining experience.

keyTakeaways: Download essential Chinese apps for payments and transport.
Embrace the local pace; Chengdu is famous for its laid-back lifestyle.
Always ask for 'wei la' (mild spice) if you're sensitive to heat.
